title: paragynoxys regis
intro: Paragynoxys regis, also known as the Tree of the King, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical forests of South America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Paragynoxys regis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
